formulas.name: Human Development Index (HDI)
formulas.formula: HDI = (Life Expectancy at Birth + Average Years of Schooling + Gross National Income per capita / 3)
formulas.variables: Life Expectancy at Birth, Average Years of Schooling, Gross National Income per capita
formulas.notes: Used to measure the quality of human development

formulas.name: Gross National Income (GNI) per capita
formulas.formula: GNI per capita = GNI / Total Population
formulas.notes: Used as one of the components of HDI

formulas.name: Human Poverty Index (HPI)
formulas.formula: HPI = (Percentage of population without access to healthcare + Percentage of population below the poverty line + Mortality rate for children under 5 years / 3)
formulas.variables: Percentage of population without access to healthcare, Percentage of population below the poverty line, Mortality rate for children under 5 years
formulas.notes: Used to measure the poverty and deprivation in a country

formulas.name: Demographic Transition Model
formulas.formula: No mathematical formula, but a graphical representation
formulas.variables: Birth rate, Death rate, Population growth rate
formulas.units: Rate per 1000 people, Rate per 1000 people, Rate per 1000 people
formulas.notes: A model that describes the changes in population growth rate as countries develop

formulas.name: Dependency Ratio
formulas.formula: Dependency Ratio = (Dependent population / Working-age population) x 100
formulas.notes: Used to measure the proportion of population that is dependent on the working-age population
